dashboard.title: Inventário de Servidores — Sítio Pé de Serra

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hostname) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM server_services WHERE scope='docker' AND snapshot_id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname)
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM inventory_snapshots
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(collected_at))*1000 as value FROM inventory_snapshots
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR

SELECT hostname, ip, os_name as OS, arch as Arch, cpu_cores as CPU, CONCAT(mem_used, ' / ', mem_total) as Memória, ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as 'Mem %', CONCAT(uptime_sec DIV 86400,'d ', (uptime_sec MOD 86400) DIV 3600,'h') as Uptime, agent_version as Agente, DATE_FORMAT(collected_at,'%H:%i:%s') as Snapshot FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname) ORDER BY hostname

SELECT ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='homeassistant' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='ia' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='www' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='mqtt' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='Ubuntu-desktop' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'homeassistant' as metric, ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='homeassistant' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'ia' as metric, ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='ia' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'www' as metric, ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='www' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'mqtt' as metric, ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='mqtt' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'Ubuntu-desktop' as metric, ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_used,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))/CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(mem_total,'Gi',''),'Mi','') AS DECIMAL(10,2))*100,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='Ubuntu-desktop' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'homeassistant' as metric, ROUND(uptime_sec/3600,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='homeassistant' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'ia' as metric, ROUND(uptime_sec/3600,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='ia' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'www' as metric, ROUND(uptime_sec/3600,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='www' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'mqtt' as metric, ROUND(uptime_sec/3600,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='mqtt' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'Ubuntu-desktop' as metric, ROUND(uptime_sec/3600,1) as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='Ubuntu-desktop' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

panels.title: Histórico — Tempo de Execução do Agente (ms)

targets.rawSql: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'homeassistant' as metric, exec_ms as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='homeassistant' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'ia' as metric, exec_ms as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='ia' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'www' as metric, exec_ms as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='www' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'mqtt' as metric, exec_ms as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='mqtt' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(collected_at)*1000 as time_sec, 'Ubuntu-desktop' as metric, exec_ms as value FROM inventory_snapshots WHERE hostname='Ubuntu-desktop' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT s.hostname, ss.container, ss.port as porta FROM server_services ss JOIN inventory_snapshots s ON ss.snapshot_id = s.id WHERE s.id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname) AND ss.scope='docker' AND ss.container IS NOT NULL AND ss.container != '' ORDER BY s.hostname, ss.port

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM server_services ss JOIN inventory_snapshots s ON ss.snapshot_id = s.id WHERE s.id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname) AND ss.scope='docker' AND s.hostname='homeassistant'

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM server_services ss JOIN inventory_snapshots s ON ss.snapshot_id = s.id WHERE s.id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname) AND ss.scope='docker' AND s.hostname='ia'

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM server_services ss JOIN inventory_snapshots s ON ss.snapshot_id = s.id WHERE s.id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname) AND ss.scope='docker' AND s.hostname='www'

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM server_services ss JOIN inventory_snapshots s ON ss.snapshot_id = s.id WHERE s.id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname) AND ss.scope='docker' AND s.hostname='mqtt'

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM server_services ss JOIN inventory_snapshots s ON ss.snapshot_id = s.id WHERE s.id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname) AND ss.scope='docker' AND s.hostname='Ubuntu-desktop'

SELECT s.hostname, ss.port as porta, ss.bind_addr as bind, ss.scope as tipo FROM server_services ss JOIN inventory_snapshots s ON ss.snapshot_id = s.id WHERE s.id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM inventory_snapshots GROUP BY hostname) AND ss.port <= 32767 ORDER BY s.hostname, ss.port
